title: chaetanthus aristatus
intro: Chaetanthus aristatus, also known as the aristate club moss, is a type of plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chaetanthus aristatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
